title: Support for SPSS Software Downloaded from the Campus Software Library
body: This license entitles the user(s) to full Technical Support from SPSS as well as free upgrades when new versions are released. For licensing questions or download assistance, please contact licensing@doit.wisc.edu Some of these files are very large, and will take a long time to download even on the UW network. Because of their size, we recommend that you do not use a wireless connection to download. After download, please install the software as a "Authorized User License." You may choose any additional language packs as you require, but this may necessitate additional downloads once the software has been installed. Only install the JAWS pack if you require accessibility assistance using that type of screen reader. Please install "Essentials for Python" when prompted. After installation choose the "License My Product Now" Option. Complete installation with a system restart. For software support, please contact IBM using the following link: https://www.ibm.com/mysupport/s/?language=en_US .
